zh.lifeSummary: 當George Taylboys於大約1466年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉時，他的父親Sir Robert Tailboys19歲，母親Elizabeth Heron18歲。他於1494年4月與Elizabeth Gascoigne在英國林可爾史爾吉結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年9月21日在英國林可爾史爾布林頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Taylboys于大约1466年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉时，他的父亲Sir Robert Tailboys19岁，母亲Elizabeth Heron18岁。他于1494年4月与Elizabeth Gascoigne在英国林可爾史爾吉结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年9月21日在英国林可爾史爾布林頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布林頓。

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Taylboys was born about 1466, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Tailboys, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth Heron, was 18. He married Elizabeth Gascoigne in April 1494, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 21 September 1538, in Bullington, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Bullington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Taylboys est né environ 1466, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Tailboys, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Heron, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gascoigne en avril 1494, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1538, à Bullington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Bullington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Taylboys um 1466 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Tailboys 19 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Heron 18. Er hat im April 1494 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Gascoigne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 21. September 1538 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Bullington, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Bullington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Taylboys è nato il circa 1466 nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Tailboys, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Heron, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Gascoigne nel aprile 1494, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1538, nel Bullington, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Bullington, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: George Taylboysが約1466年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Tailboysは19歳，母Elizabeth Heronは18歳であった。1494年4月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメでElizabeth Gascoigneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年9月21日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブリントンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Taylboys(이)가 대략 1466년 영국 링코실르 키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Tailboys(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Heron(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1494년 4월 영국 링코실르 키에서 Elizabeth Gascoigne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 9월 21일 영국 링코실르 불링턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 불링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Taylboys nasceu aproximadamente 1466, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Tailboys, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Heron, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gascoigne em abril de 1494, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1538, em Bullington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Bullington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Taylboys родился около 1466 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Tailboys было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Heron, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gascoigne апрель 1494 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 21 сентября 1538 г. в местности буллингтон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности буллингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1538, en Bullington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Bullington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
